title: arachniodes cornu-cervi
intro: Arachniodes cornu-cervi, also known as Deer's Horn Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Arachniodes cornu-cervi include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Arachniodes cornu-cervi can be prepared as an infusion or decoction to be used as a tea, and its extracts can also be used in herbal preparations for topical application.
